name: chave-mestra-arquiteto
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User says 'popula o Notion', 'cria as tarefas no Notion', 'esteira notion', 'MINHA ESTEIRA'; 2. User has a campaign plan and needs to execute it operationally in Notion with one row per day; 3. User says 'registra a campanha no Notion', 'cria as linhas do lançamento no Notion', 'coloca isso no Notion'; 4. User needs to find a product in Notion, locate its sub-database, and create content entries; 5. User says 'atualiza a esteira', 'cria o banco de dados do lançamento', 'popula os dias da campanha'; 6. User has campaign copy ready (from Estrategista) and needs it moved into Notion structure; 7. Any request to bridge campaign planning into Notion operational execution via MINHA ESTEIRA protocol.
